Az.Tools.Predictor.Name: Az.Tools.Predictor
Az.Tools.Predictor.Description:
Microsoft Azure PowerShell - Module providing recommendations for cmdlets comprised in the Az module - This module requires PowerShell 7.2 and PSReadLine 2.2.2.

Suggestions must be activated:
- Enable-AzPredictor:  Activate the suggestions
- Disable-AzPredictor: Disable the suggestions

For more information on Az Predictor, please visit the following: https://aka.ms/azpredictordocs

CompletionPredictor.Name: CompletionPredictor
CompletionPredictor.Description: Command-line intellisense based on PowerShell auto-completion

posh-git.Name: posh-git
posh-git.Description: Provides prompt with Git status summary information and tab completion for Git commands, parameters, remotes and branch names.

PSFzf.Name: PSFzf
PSFzf.Description: A thin wrapper around Fzf (https://github.com/junegunn/fzf).  If PSReadline is loaded, this wrapper registers Fzf with the keyboard chord Ctrl+t.

PSReadLine.Name: PSReadLine
PSReadLine.Description: Great command line editing in the PowerShell console host

PSScriptAnalyzer.Name: PSScriptAnalyzer
PSScriptAnalyzer.Description: PSScriptAnalyzer provides script analysis and checks for potential code defects in the scripts by applying a group of built-in or customized rules on the scripts being analyzed.

PSWindowsUpdate.Name: PSWindowsUpdate
PSWindowsUpdate.Description: This module contain cmdlets to manage Windows Update Client.

scoop-completion.Name: scoop-completion
scoop-completion.Description: A Scoop tab completion module for PowerShell.

Terminal-Icons.Name: Terminal-Icons
Terminal-Icons.Description: PowerShell module to add file icons to terminal based on file extension

z.Name: z
z.Description: z lets you quickly navigate the file system in PowerShell based on your cd command history. It's a port of the z bash shell script
